# Vendor binaries

Place optional third-party tools here or in the Netvan data directory:

- `speedtest.exe` — [Ookla Speedtest CLI](https://www.speedtest.net/apps/cli)
- `WinDivert.dll` / `WinDivert64.sys` — [WinDivert](https://reqrypt.org/windivert.html) for Full capture mode

Do not commit proprietary binaries to git.
